Tip of the day
Hunting activities that require inputs get bonuses from using FINE versions of them! Check the interface for what they give!

Sea fishing (Rod)

From Walkscape Walkthrough

Sea fishing (Rod)
Main Skill: Fishing
Max Efficiency: 170%

Along the shoreline, you find a secluded spot and cast your rod into the calm waters, enjoying the peaceful solitude of sea fishing.

The Sea fishing (Rod) activity is a Fishing activity.

Locations

This activity can be done at the following locations:

  • Granfiddich Shores in Grand Duchy of Trellin-Erdwise
  • Port Skildar in Jarvonia

Visibility

This activity is always visible.

Requirements

Skill Level Requirements:

  • At least Fishing lvl. 20.

Keyword Requirements:

  • Have Fishing rod equipped.

Experience Information

Skill Base

Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Total Base

Each of the secondary drops is rolled independently of the others.
